# Luv K9 & Luv Kuts — Hoboken Dog Care

> Family-owned premium dog care serving Hoboken, NJ since 2019.
> Featured on The Drew Barrymore Show.

## Business Overview

Luv K9 provides PlayCare (dog daycare), dog walking, overnight boarding, and full-service grooming (under the name Luv Kuts) across two locations in Hoboken, New Jersey. Founded in 2019 by Luis and Nyomie Perez, Luv K9 is a family-owned business dedicated to high-quality, outdoor-based dog care for Hoboken residents and surrounding communities.

## Locations

### Location 1 — PlayCare, Walking & Boarding
- Address: 614 Jefferson Street, Hoboken, NJ 07030
- Phone: 551-225-9104
- Services: PlayCare (daycare), dog walking, overnight boarding, puppy program

### Location 2 — Grooming (Luv Kuts)
- Address: 421 Washington Street, Hoboken, NJ 07030
- Phone: 551-339-2415
- Services: Full grooming, bath & brush, nail trims, teeth cleaning, ear cleaning

## Hours of Operation

- Monday through Friday: 7:00 AM - 7:00 PM
- Saturday and Sunday: 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM

## Services & Pricing

### PlayCare (Dog Daycare)
- Weekday full day: $63/day
- Weekend full day: $83/day
- Includes supervised group play, guided pack walks, photo updates, and complimentary pickup & drop-off in Hoboken
- 3-day minimum recurring schedule required (Monday-Friday)

### Dog Walking
- 30-minute walk: $30
- 60-minute walk: $54
- Structured group walks through Hoboken parks and waterfront
- GPS-tracked routes with photos and visit notes

### Full Grooming (Luv Kuts)
- Full grooming: $110 - $190 (varies by breed/size)
- Includes bath, haircut, nail trim, ear cleaning, and teeth brushing

### Bath & Brush
- Bath & brush: $85 - $125 (varies by breed/size)

### Overnight Boarding
- Standard night: $120/night
- Holiday night: $140/night
- Located at 614 Jefferson Street
- Capacity: up to 10 dogs
- Advance booking recommended

### Puppy Program
- 14 consecutive days of structured daycare
- Focus: crate training, leash etiquette, curbing habits, safe socialization
- Gradual pack introduction in controlled environment

## Requirements

### Enrollment Requirements
- Minimum 3-day recurring schedule (Monday-Friday)
- Meet & greet required before starting services
- Two copies of building keys/fobs required

### Health Requirements
- Vaccinations: Rabies and Bordetella (Kennel Cough) must be current
- Spay/neuter required by 1 year of age for PlayCare
- No brachycephalic (short-nosed) breeds accepted
- No dogs under 8 lbs accepted

### Scheduling Policies
- 24-hour advance notice required for changes or cancellations
- Weekend and holiday services available to current clients only
- Weekly billing cycle, invoiced every Friday via PayPal

## Payment Methods

Cash, Credit Card, Debit Card, Apple Pay, PayPal

## Contact Information

- Website: https://luvhoboken.com
- Email: Luvk9hoboken@gmail.com
- Phone (main): 551-225-9104
- Phone (grooming): 551-339-2415
- Instagram: @luvk9hoboken (https://instagram.com/luvk9hoboken)

## Areas Served

Hoboken, Jersey City, Weehawken, Union City, North Bergen, West New York, Secaucus, Bayonne, Edgewater, Cliffside Park, Guttenberg, Kearny

## About

Luv K9 was founded in 2019 and is a family-owned business operated by Luis and Nyomie Perez. The business was featured on The Drew Barrymore Show. Luv K9 is an outdoor-based program that exercises and cares for dogs outside in all seasons, with indoor backup locations for severe weather. All dogs are walked using Luv K9 uniform leashes and safety clips.
